rationale: Educ. Code §29.121 defines 'gifted and talented student' and has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: "gifted and talented student" means a child or youth who performs at or shows the potential for performing at a remarkably high level of accomplishment when compared to others of the same age, experience, or environment
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict detected.
